- [ ] Clarify Project Requirements
  - Win32 C++ desktop organizer (SimpleFences)
  - CMake build system
  - Phase 1 feature set: basic fences, drag/drop, persistence

- [ ] Scaffold the Project
  - [x] Create source directory structure
  - [x] Create header files (Models.h, FenceStorage.h, Persistence.h, FenceManager.h, FenceWindow.h, TrayMenu.h, App.h, Win32Helpers.h)
  - [x] Create implementation files (complete .cpp files)
  - [x] Create CMakeLists.txt
  - [x] Create README.md with build and run instructions

- [ ] Compile the Project
  - [ ] Test CMake configuration
  - [ ] Verify all dependencies link correctly
  - [ ] Build in Debug x64
  - [ ] Resolve any compilation errors

- [ ] Run and Test
  - [ ] App launches and tray icon appears
  - [ ] Right-click tray → "New Fence" works
  - [ ] Fence can be created, moved, resized
  - [ ] Drag desktop files into fence
  - [ ] Files move to backing folder
  - [ ] Fence reloads on restart

- [ ] Documentation Complete
  - [x] README.md created with build and usage instructions
  - [ ] Verify copilot-instructions.md is complete
  - [ ] Clean up any HTML comments
